CE1.justification: Agent acted directly without asking the user to clarify or recall anything, loading AGENTS.md files itself rather than offloading orientation cost to the user.

CE2.justification: Response is substantially padded with an exhaustive walkthrough of every rejected option (tmp/, projects/, observations.md, daybook) before reaching the recommendation, plus a multi-step future-promotion plan that goes well beyond the routing question asked.

CE3.justification: Routing destination and reasoning are stated up front in one clause ("resources/ — but only barely") with the why made explicit, and the provenance caveat is flagged in-band so the user can redirect cheaply.

CE4.justification: No files were written to the workspace; the recommendation is a single-file drop with a clean promotion path, so interruption at any point leaves zero orphaned artifacts.
